scripts.codegen:postgres: env-cmd --no-override -x -r ../../env-dev.json -e postgres node ../../packages/vexnor/cli.mjs codegen --plugin vexnor-postgres --schema vexnor_dev  --camelCaseColumns --host \$POSTGRES_HOST --port \$POSTGRES_PORT --database \$POSTGRES_DATABASE --user \$POSTGRES_USER --password \$POSTGRES_PASSWORD --outDir './shared/codegen/postgres' | pino-pretty
scripts.codegen:mssql: env-cmd --no-override -x -r ../../env-dev.json -e mssql node ../../packages/vexnor/cli.mjs codegen --plugin vexnor-mssql --schema vexnor_dev  --camelCaseColumns --host \$MSSQL_HOST --port \$MSSQL_PORT --database \$MSSQL_DATABASE --user \$MSSQL_USER --password \$MSSQL_PASSWORD --outDir './shared/codegen/mssql' | pino-pretty
scripts.codegen:sqlite3: env-cmd --no-override -x -r ../../env-dev.json -e sqlite3 node ../../packages/vexnor/cli.mjs codegen --plugin vexnor-sqlite3 --schema main  --camelCaseColumns --uri \$SQLITE_PATH --omit migration_vexnor --outDir './shared/codegen/sqlite3' | pino-pretty
